recommendation: Do not activate a model or blend. Continue research-only work focused on expanding trainable market-covered history and improving pre-fight feature signal before any active model_versions write.
activation_blockers: No candidate beats the no-vig market favorite by the required +2pp simulated ROI gate.
Trainable model-family experiments have only 26 model-eligible events after requiring prior market-covered training fights.
Current XGBoost, logistic regression, and conservative feature ablations degrade ROI and probability quality versus the market favorite.
Validated/value UI, API, and docs claims remain blocked until a separate activation epic passes the gate.

next_recommended_epic.title: D2-TMC: Trainable market-covered corpus expansion
next_recommended_epic.goal: Increase prior-trainable market-covered events enough that walk-forward model-family experiments can score at least 30 model-eligible events while preserving leakage controls.
suggested_tasks: Identify additional older UFC FightOdds events before the current 37-event window.
Import and entity-resolve those events into historical_odds_events, historical_odds_fights, historical_moneyline_odds, and unmatched_historical_odds.
Rerun coverage, leakage, market gate, blend, and model-family reports.
Only create an activation epic if a candidate beats the no-vig market favorite by at least +2pp with stable coverage and non-degraded probability metrics.
